testcase.name: tests.test_api
testcase.error:
/usr/local/python/3.12.1/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:2116: in _exec_insertmany_context dialect.do_execute( /usr/local/python/3.12.1/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/default.py:924: in do_execute cursor.execute(statement, parameters) E sqlite3.IntegrityError: UNIQUE constraint failed: census_tracts.census_tract
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_api.py:2: in <module> from main import app, create_access_token main.py:10: in <module> from database import CensusTract, get_db database.py:45: in <module> init_db() database.py:35: in init_db session.commit() /usr/local/python/3.12.1/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/orm/session.py:2017: in commit
